mnemonics: SCALING UP: Scalability, Cost-Effectiveness, Agility, Location Independence, Ubiquitous Access, Security, Integration, Networking, Green IT, Utility Computing, Performance, Internet-based
keyPoints: Cloud Computing provides on-demand access to a shared pool of configurable computing resources.
Essential characteristics include broad network access, rapid elasticity, measured service, resource pooling, and on-demand self-service.
Deployment models are Public, Private, Community, and Hybrid clouds.
commonMistakes: Assuming all data in the cloud is automatically secure and forgetting the shared responsibility model.
Confusing scalability with performance; a scalable system can handle growth, but that doesn't guarantee fast performance.
Believing cloud computing is always cheaper without proper cost management and monitoring.
